main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'glue line defect membrane elements defective lot + progressive salt leakage compromised seals' literal — captura una de 3 hipótesis (Open).

requested_data.justification: Pide microscopic/visual autopsy inspection glue line + delamination — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: autopsy sin defecto + active layer degradation/biofilm/scaling → switch.
